channel.title: Blogs on lizblog
channel.description: Recent content in Blogs on lizblog

item.title: Day 1
item.description: Why? I am the first to reckognize that starting a blog is somewhat cringe but I am using it to better myself so it does not matter. The reason for starting this is rooted partially in Absurdist Philosphy. When I was getting into that kind of stuff I had a hard time wrapping my head around it so here is my bad explination. Ask any question, for example, why do I want to date this girl?
